subject: [RFC v2 15/21] mm: thp: remove pgtable_trans_huge_{deposit/withdraw} when not needed

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified that the patch only removes dead code for architectures where arch_needs_pgtable_deposit() returns true. Suggested checking if this condition is still met after the rename and removal.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes to remove the generic implementation of pgtable_trans_huge_{deposit/withdraw} in mm/pgtable-generic.c, as it is only needed for architectures where arch_needs_pgtable_deposit() returns true (currently powerpc hash MMU). The patch renames these functions to arch_pgtable_trans_huge_{deposit/withdraw} and replaces the extern declarations with static inline no-op stubs for the default case.
